articles.title: IEEE Honors Robotics Pioneer Toshio Fukuda
articles.summary: Toshio Fukuda has been blazing trails for most of his career. He is considered to be one of the most prolific scholars in robotics, writing more than 2,000 research papers and authoring several books on the field. articles.title: Nokia’s 14 Years of Mobile-Phone Supremacy Ended in an Afternoon
